issues.detail: The requirement says a request with "no resolvable binding is recorded as \"unattributed\"." The invalid-binding fixtures only require "recorded without false attribution to a real task of this project," which permits other incorrect values or an association to another project's task.
issues.fix: For both invalid-binding fixtures, assert the row is exactly "unattributed" and stores no task association.

issues.detail: The clause "one append-only usage log" has no effective negative-path test. AT-034.07 mentions append-only parenthetically but never attempts mutation or deletion of an existing row.
issues.fix: Attempt update, overwrite, and deletion of a recorded row; assert each is rejected and the original row remains unchanged.

issues.detail: The expected "fuel meter ... UNCHANGED" result is under-specified. The fixture excludes corresponding billed cost but does not hold provider usage reporting constant, even though the requirement permits the live fuel meter to derive from that reporting.
issues.fix: Seed usage-log rows while explicitly leaving both provider billed-cost and usage-reporting snapshots unchanged, then assert the fuel meter is unchanged.

issues.detail: The mapped two-meter test omits the requirement's provider-truth source "Lovable's credit status (REQ-021)." It tests only Anthropic billed cost and usage reporting.
issues.fix: Add a fixture proving Lovable status is rendered from Lovable truth and is unaffected by attribution-log token rows, or delegate explicitly to the matching REQ-021 test.

issues.detail: No test covers "per-task baselines are token-based." Token-denominated attribution views do not prove that per-task baselines exist or use token units.
issues.fix: Seed task history, compute/read a per-task baseline, and assert its values and displayed units are tokens with no currency conversion.

issues.detail: The coverage map assigns the full disabling clause to AT-034.12, but neither it nor cross-test AT-028.19 verifies that disabling the Skill is "immediate." They begin with an already-disabled Skill.
issues.fix: Disable the Skill during an active guided session and assert the next otherwise-valid request flows immediately, without a Skill-local pause or penalty, and records as unattributed.

issues.detail: The NGO aggregation clause requires the burn view to be "token-denominated, no celebration." AT-034.13 covers token units and visible lines but has no assertion against celebratory presentation.
issues.fix: Assert the rendered burn view contains no celebratory copy, badge, animation, or equivalent success treatment.

issues.detail: The requirement says "Per-volunteer-per-task detail ... stay coordinator-side." AT-034.13 proves only its absence from NGO surfaces, while AT-034.14 proves coordinator visibility only for unattributed-% and binding-failure signals; no test proves coordinator access to per-volunteer-per-task detail.
issues.fix: Assert the coordinator surface exposes volunteer-by-task token detail and that the same detail is absent from NGO and public surfaces.
